name: pro-plugin
description: Consult ChatGPT web Pro mode from Codex through a user-owned browser session.

interface.shortDescription: Ask ChatGPT Pro mode from Codex
interface.longDescription: Adds a local MCP companion tool that connects to a user-controlled Chrome or Chromium session over CDP, selects ChatGPT Pro mode when possible, submits a prompt, and returns the response to Codex.
defaultPrompt: Ask ChatGPT Pro for a second opinion
Use Pro mode to analyze this design
Compare Codex's answer with ChatGPT Pro
